reviews.comment:
Herrible, una estrella porque sacaron el cargador de agua caliente gratis y pusieron a un Terminator y te sale 100 pesos. Que sigue? Que me cobren por inflar más ruedas de la moto? Indignante

(Translated by Google)
Terrible, one star because they took away the free hot water dispenser and replaced it with a Terminator-themed one that costs 100 pesos. What's next? Will they charge me to inflate more motorcycle tires? Outrageous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4a29hd3lnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, deje las luces puestas y me quede sin batería, a los 20' estaban presentes con un técnico muy amable. El ACA nunca me dejo a pie ...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I left my lights on and my battery died, and they arrived within 20 minutes with a very friendly technician. ACA has never left me stranded...
